markdownRemark.html:
In late 2018, we made improvements to how we get maps on boston.gov. We wrote about the updates in detail on the Digital Team's blog.

From a technical stand point, we leveraged web components that we wrapped up in a custom Drupal component. The web component uses esri-leafet which lets us integrate with our data hosted on ArcGIS Online.

For every map we put on boston.gov, we want to make sure the data continues to get updated and doesn't goes stale. As a result, we work with departments to ensure they have ways to update their data, whether that be through a google sheet that updates a dataset on ArcGIS Online nightly, or directly in ArcGIS Online.
